gradings: Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: حسن كالصحيح - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (125/ 9)
Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: حسن كالصحيح - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (125/ 9)
text: مَنْ أَطْعَمَ مُؤْمِناً مِنْ جُوعٍ أَطْعَمَهُ اللَّهُ مِنْ ثِمَارِ الْجَنَّةِ وَ مَنْ سَقَى مُؤْمِناً مِنْ ظَمَإٍ سَقَاهُ اللَّهُ مِنَ الرَّحِيقِ الْمَخْتُومِ .

en.hubeali: From him, from his father, from Hammad, from Ibrahim, from Abu Hamza,

(It has been narrated) from Aliasws Bin Al-Husaynasws having said: ‘The one who feeds a Momin from hunger, Allahazwj would Feed him from the fruits of the Paradise; and the one who quenches a Momin from thirst, Allahazwj would Quench him from the Sealed Nectar (الرَّحِيقِ الْمَخْتُومِ)’.
en.sarwar: 5. It is narrated from him (narrator of the Hadith above) from his father from Hammad from Ibrahim from abu Hamza from Ali ibn al-Husayn (a.s.) who has said the following: “Whoever provides food to a believer to satisfy his hunger Allah will feed him with the fruits of paradise and whoever provides water to quench the thirst of a believer Allah will quench his thirst from the wine of paradise which is in sealed containers.”
